By Russell Brunson, the Overnight
Success Maker
I’m
very excited for this issue. We’re
getting back to our testing roots, and
you get to benefit from it
big time! Yes,
if you’ve read the DotComSsecrets Labs
book, then you know we do a
lot of
testing... But, to test well, you need a
lot
of traffic...
A big majority of the DotComSecrets
Labs book came from our Neuracel
and DotComSecretsX offers. Both were
cold traffic offers and had a
lot of traffic
coming to them everyday, so we could
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 13 --

2 | Issue No. 5
test a lot of things very fast.
But we recently sold Neuracel, and no longer actively
promote DotComSecretsX. Between that, and focusing on
launching ClickFunnels, we haven’t done a ton of testing
lately for many of our pages. In fact, our testing focus has
been on the webinar registration and sales process (you’ve
seen our results in the past few issues).
Anyway, recently we looked at the stats of the main
ClickFunnels sales page, as well as each of the pages in the
signup sequence, and found some really interesting things...
• 	First, we were getting (on average) about 200 people to
register for the “free trial” every day! Yea!
• 	Second, even with 200 signups a day – that was
only a
1.7 percent conversion rate from click to trial...
boo L
(Can you say, a
lot of lost $...)!
• 	Third, from the 200 people a day that start the free trial,
only 32 percent put in their credit card. (Hmm... more
room for improvement).
• 	Fourth, from that 32 percent who put in their credit card,
only 37.81 percent made it through the trial... (this one
was the
big shocker to me and what we addressed first).
• 	Fifth, from those who got billed month one, this is how
many people we lose each month...
- 	Month 1, we lose 17.83%
- 	Month 2, 15.72%
- 	Month 3, 8.59%
- 	Month 4, 5.16%
- 	Month 5, 4.06%
- 	Month 6, 3.02%
- 	Month 7, 2.08%
- 	Month 8, 1.48%
- 	Month 9, 1.09%
As you can see, by month six our churn starts to drop under
three percent, which is pretty good. So, here are the core
things we learned:
Initial ClickF	unnels #s
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 13 --

DotComSecrets Labs | 3
video UNlLOCKER
Okay, so that helped us see where our gaps were, and that’s
the beauty of direct response marketing. The numbers
tell you everything - what’s working, what’s not, and most
importantly,
where you should put your focus first.
The first issue we wanted to fix was increasing the number of
people who put in their credit card to get billed.
Goal 1: Increase Member Trial To Paid
Member Percentage
After digging through our stats, we found that anyone
who started building a funnel, usually never cancelled their
accounts. We needed
something to get people to consume.
Initially the thought was to help people create a funnel, then
we would ship them a t-shirt. We had seen that work for
P90X, Insanity, Mail Chimp and other companies; maybe it
could work for us.
The problem was we didn’t have a really easy way to do that,
so we came up with a quick solution that we put together in
a few hours. I recorded four videos teaching members
how
to consume our product – and if they watched the videos,
then we’d ship them a #FunnelHacker t-shirt.
38%peOple whO gave uS theiR
cRedit caRd
and Made it
thROugh the fRee tRial -
iMpROving thiS BecaMe the
fiRSt fOcuS Of OuR teSting
aveRage daily SignupS fOR
clickfunnelS tRial accOuntS
- Of thOSe, 32 peRcent gave
uS theiR cRedit caRd nuMBeR
200
Free T-Shirt Offer For Watching Four Training Videos
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 13 --

4 | Issue No. 5
Our thought was that if they could understand the product
better, then they’d be more likely to stick. You can see what
happened in the screenshots above.
Yes, we increased our stick rate from trial to first billing from
37.81% to 46.84%! That’s a
23.88% increase in stick rate. At
our current rates, that little tweak will be worth
millions of
dollars a year in found revenue!
There are lots of ways that
you could use the video unlocker
concept. You could use it in your signup flow like we did...
Add it to a members area, or thank you page to unlock
other products or bonus training. If you need to get your
customers to consume what you’re selling... then test out
the video unlocker element we added for you inside of
ClickFunnels.
PRE-Video Unlocker:
POST-Video Unlocker:
38% 	47%
+24%
Stick Rate
PRE-Video Unlocker 	POST-Video Unlocker
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 13 --

6 | Issue No. 5
While I’m really happy with the 23.88% increase, I’m still not
happy to be at 46.84%. My goal is 70%, and I’ll keep sharing
with you what we’re doing in future issues of this newsletter.
Goal 2: Increase Conversions To The Free Trial
So, I’ve got to admit. When we first launched ClickFunnels, I
did what most people do. We looked at every SAAS company
out there, and funnel hacked the processes of our favorites. I
thought that was smart, but turns out few of them have any
idea what they’re doing.
It wasn’t until last week when we hired Neil Patel to train
us on our content strategy that he started asking about our
landing page. We started digging deeper into our numbers
and quickly found out how bad they really were...
Later in the conversation I showed Neil our registration page
for the Funnel Hacks webinar, and showed him how our
conversions from email hover between 65 and 75 percent.
He laughed for a bit, then asked, “Why don’t you just make
that your landing page...?” And that’s where the testing
began J. It’s only been a week, and the results from that test,
and a few since then, have been nothing short of amazing.
Let me show you what we are testing:
• 	The Control: This page was our long form sales letter
that has been live for almost a year (makes me want
to cry now knowing how much money we’ve been
losing... ha ha).
• 	V1: This was our straight webinar registration page, but
we added in the “Free Trial, Login, and Pricing” links
at the top for existing members, and because all SAAS
companies have a pricing page... J
Results of Control VS V1: This Test Was
REALLY Cool
Before we were getting 1.7 percent of people who hit the
page to fill out step one in the free trial process. By changing
the homepage to a webinar registration form, we were able
to get 9.1 percent of the people to register for the webinar
SAAS VS Registration Tests
and we were still able to get over one percent of the people
to take the trial - which is a very small drop (on the “thank
you page” we offer the trial).
Right now, each webinar registration is worth $35 on
average to us within five days. So while we had a tiny dip in
initial trial conversions, we added an extra $3.18 immediate
upfront EPC!
•	
V2 – No Pricing Table: So, like all good SAAS companies,
we had a cool pricing table. That’s what people want,
right? Well, they might want it, but our test shows it
dramatically hurt conversions. All we did was take
off the
“Pricing” link at the top and two cool things happened:
- 	First, our trials went
up by 20 percent.
- 	Second, our webinar registrations went up from
9.1 to 13.46 percent! Yes, a
huge 41.91% jump,
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 13 --

DotComSecrets Labs | 7
video UNlLOCKER
Listen To Your Numbers, Not Tweets!
$3.18 	$4.71
+$1.53
eaRningS PeR click
V1 Link to Pricing Table 	V2 No Pricing Table
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 13 --

increasing our initial EPC to $4.71. That means a
lot
when you’re buying traffic.
• 	V3 and V4 – I actually like the format of these pages the
most, but so far we can’t get them to win. Versions three
and four are the same, except for the headlines. We
made a cool demo video showing us using the software
in the background, and are testing a few different
headlines, but so far, we just can’t get either to win. So,
my goal for next month, is to have one of these pages
become our new control!
So, the moral of this story, is even when you’re funnel hacking,
you
have to be testing. Use your hacks as the control, but you
should constantly be striving to beat it every day! And the
great news – ClickFunnels makes is
super easy to test!

lucrative and rewarding. Because the internet is constantly changing, the sites and services presented in this book may change, cease or expand with time. We hope that the skills and
knowledge acquired from this course will provide you with the ability to adapt to inevitable internet evolution. However, we cannot be held responsible for changes that may affect the
applicability of these techniques.

well as stated in any examples. If you rely upon any figures provided, you must accept the entire risk of not doing as well as the information provided.

-- 8 of 13 --

HENRY KAMINSKI JR, 	INNER CIRCLE
DCS SUCCESS
Q: Can you tell us a little about your business,
why you started and how long you’ve been
an entrepreneur?
A: Back in 2006, I was working at a hospital as a special events
director and was in charge of planning charity events to raise
money and awareness for the SIDS Center of New Jersey
(Sudden Infant Death Syndrome). The monies raised would
benefit families in NJ who went through the tragedy of losing
their baby to SIDS. It was a super rewarding job but very
emotional at the same time!
When I was planning these events, I always needed flyers and
marketing materials designed to help promote the event. One
day, after literally sending out a random email to one of the
DJ’s at one of New York City’s biggest radio stations (Z100)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 13 --

help and serve others who needed my help... I struggled for
months trying to find the right guidance...
Q: How have Russell and DotComSecrets
helped your business grow?
A: What can I say, If I hadn’t found Clickfunnels and Russell I
would still be spinning my wheels...
Since meeting Russell, he has given me the guidance and
the ability to connect with a group of individuals inside this
asking them to sponsor one of my events, she replied YES!
At that point I needed my designs for this particular event to
look extra awesome so I asked my buddy who was a graphic
designer to help me create all the marketing. As I sat next
to him on that Sunday morning, watching him design these
awesome ads, I fell in love with graphic design.
So after that event’s success, I set out to learn Photoshop
and study design all on my own. After months of designing
on a little laptop (with no mouse mind you) in my little tiny
apartment, sitting on nothing but a little barstool, I started to
pick up some clients...
After two years of doing both, working at the hospital and
building up my design business... I got the call... The hospital
was laying off tons of people that year and I was one of them...
So I took life by the reigns and said “I can do this” and took on
Unique Designz full time...
Within the first year, I made over $250K all by myself... So
I knew at that point that I could be this person they called
an entrepreneur J. Since September 2007, I’ve worked with
hundreds of small businesses designing their marketing
materials and print collateral and one by one helped them
build a more credible and professional image for their brand
through my creative designs.
The highlight of my career was actually having the
opportunity to design a CD from cover to cover along with
having the chance to design and create all the marketing
materials for two of his world tours. This guy you might know
by the name of Bon Jovi...
Q: What challenges were you facing when
you decided to join DCS Ignite?
A: The challenges I faced before joining the Ignite group was
that I needed a coach I could relate to and connect with who
could help me scale my business up... I knew there had to be a
way to help and serve my clients at a higher level.
My business was running me instead of me running my
business. I needed guidance as to how I could take my God
given talent and creativity and bring it to another level to
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Russell has helped me tremendously by keeping me focused
on my goals when sometimes I veer off course and has
aligned me with the right people to help me where I needed
help the most in my business. He’s given me great pointers on
how to take my design talent and personal characteristics of
myself and incorporate them into designing funnels to help
others grow their businesses.
Russell was the one who suggested I create a new company

-- 11 of 13 --

Join Inner Circle members like Henry by applying
online at http://ignite.dotcomsecrets.com
called www.uniquefunneldesigns.com. By helping others
attract more customers and generate more sales through
designing marketing and sales funnels has tripled the growth
of my business in just four months. So much so that I had
to hire two more designers and set up a call center to help
manage the volume.
In just six weeks, I was able to recoup my investment I spent
on signing up for the Ignite Program.
Q: How has that changed your life?
A: Being part of the Ignite group has changed my life in so
many ways... I’ve met so many brilliant people within the
group who have helped me grow my business as well as
helped me find traits within myself that I never knew I had...
I think the biggest way joining the group has changed
my life is this.... Before meeting Russell and knowing what
Clickfunnels even was, I was petrified of starting a family with
my wife. I never thought I would be financially capable of
supporting a family.
But after meeting a few folks in the group, that made me
understand that this thinking was just a limiting belief that
was stopping me from obtaining my goals.
Since joining the group, my confidence in myself and my
business has skyrocketed! I now have all the confidence in the
world to become the successful business owner, awesome
husband and hopefully one day soon, the best “DAD” I
can possibly be! My wife and I just recently have begun
the process of trying to start a family... If that’s not a game
changer, I don’t know what else is!
I look at my business, clients and prospects completely
different now and it’s all thanks to Russell and all the other
Ignite members.
Without joining the Ignite program and taking action on
trying to better myself and my business, I’d still be in the same
spot I was six months ago...
Q: Can you share a favorite accomplishment
you’ve made as a business owner?
A: One of my favorite accomplishments I’ve made as a
business owner is taking a hobby and turning it into a
successful business as a “one man show.”
Looking back on the last eight years, I don’t regret a damn
thing. You can make anything out of yourself and life if you
only take action and commit to achieving nothing less than
outstanding success!
Q: What is your top goal for the rest of 2015?
A: My top goal for 2015 is to hit $100K by the end of the year.
